original_note:
Clinic:
Pt presents with father with no CC, referred from UOP Pedo clinic. Pt has class I molars (slight class III on left) with class I canines. Severe crowding in upper arch (U-shaped maxilla) and moderate crowding in lower arch. UR5/6 are in posterior crossbite. U2s are in anterior crossbite with L2s and UR1 in crossbite with LR1. Midlines are on, lower arttached gingiva appears adequate. Prominent marginal ridges on upper incisors. OB is 0-3mm, OJ is 0.5 mm. No TMJ CC. Jaw deviates slightly to right upon opening and returns to midline upon closure. Recommended treatment is to extract 4 bicuspids to resolve upper and lower crowding to prevent profile change.

original_note:
Clinic:
INITIAL UPPER BONDING AND QUAD HELIX DELIVERY - seen with [DOCTOR] presents with Dad to initial banding/bonding. Polished teeth. Showed patient proper oral hygiene. Delivered quad helix with bandlock after activating it ~3mm per side. Bonded U5-5 and U7s with Victory brackets. 014 nitinol wire. Open coil chain placed to make space for U2s. Power chained from U3-U6 bilaterally to move the canines distally into the extracted space of 4's, which would then create space for the laterals to come labially with the push from the quad helix arms. Took lower alginate impression for lower retainer with bite plane. NV: 2 weeks, with [DOCTOR] - seen with [DOCTOR] presents with Dad to progress appt. Pt reported having gotten a cleaning. Replaced 014 nitinol wire to a new 014 nitinol with annealed ends. Steel tied the upper centals and canines. Replaced power chain from U3-6 bilaterally. Kept the same open coil chains in between the U1-U3s. Will wait to create lab prescription for lower retainer with bite plane until the U2's are ready to be bracketed NV: April (activate quad helix, change wire to 018)

Strength of additional overlay will prevent other incisors other than the U2s from moving lingually as the U2s move facially. PC U6s to U3s. U6s turbos added to allow bite jumping of blocked out U2s. L: .014 cuniti from L6-6, lower 2s engaged. PC L6s to L3s. Rx: Bilat. triangle elastics U3 to L3,L4 to bring more the canines into arch. NTO now instead of FT. NV: Pics with [STAFF] at 4 PM. Continuous wire U6-6, engaging the U2s. Discontinue lower L6s to L3s because L3s will be in arch.
Rx: Continue for 1 wk only, 1 turn RPE/day.
